meta.title: GEONYX | Licensing – IP, Technology Transfer, Joint Ventures
meta.description: License GEONYX's patented geopolymer formulas, transfer the technology to local production, or build a joint venture for large-scale infrastructure projects.

hero.description: GEONYX's patented geopolymer formulas are available for licensing, transfer and joint production. We don't look for clients — we select partners.

ip.title: IP LICENSING
ip.subtitle: Produce GEONYX in your market
ip.description: License our patented geopolymer formulas and produce GEONYX systems for your region. You get full access to the formulations, QC standards and the right to use the brand.
ip.i1: Full formula base for all 4 systems (ARMOR, CHEM, THERM, HYDRO)
ip.i2: QC protocols, quality standards and testing methods
ip.i3: Right to use the GEONYX brand in the licensed territory
ip.i4: Technical personnel training — on-site and remote
ip.i5: Ongoing technical support and access to new developments

transfer.title: TECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
transfer.subtitle: Full independence with local raw materials
transfer.description: Full transfer of the production process with adaptation to locally available raw materials and aggregates. Your plant, your materials — our technology, your independence.
transfer.i1: Formula adaptation to locally available aggregates and admixtures
transfer.i2: Installation and commissioning of the production line
transfer.i3: Training of the entire production and technical team
transfer.i4: Full documentation: technical specifications and work instructions

jv.title: JOINT VENTURES
jv.subtitle: Large-scale projects. Shared risk. Shared success.
jv.description: For airports, ports, industrial zones and large-scale infrastructure where technology and local capacity must work together in a single structure.
jv.i1: Flexible JV models: 50/50, revenue share or royalty licensing
jv.i2: GEONYX contributes technology, IP and full technical supervision
jv.i3: Partner contributes local capacity, raw materials and market access
jv.i4: Applicable to airports, ports, industrial parks and rail infrastructure
jv.i5: Minimum project volume: 50,000 m² installed area

process.title: THE PARTNERSHIP PROCESS
process.s1desc: Submit an expression of interest with information about your company, target market and type of partnership.
process.s2desc: Our team evaluates the fit. If there is mutual interest, we send a confidentiality NDA.
process.s3desc: Technical and commercial negotiations. Defining scope, terms and contractual structure.
process.s4desc: Contract signing and onboarding — training, documentation, technical launch.
process.disclaimer: We only consider serious applications from qualified companies with proven manufacturing or investment capacity.

cta.title: READY FOR PARTNERSHIP?
cta.subtitle: Fill in the form. We will respond within 48 hours.
cta.disclaimer: All enquiries are confidential. We only consider serious applications from qualified companies.
cta.successDesc: We will contact you within 48 business hours.
